svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: AISIX AI Gateway architecture
svg.desc: Your apps speak one OpenAI- or Anthropic-compatible API to the AISIX gateway, which applies API key auth, rate limiting and budgets, guardrails, caching, routing and failover, and observability, then dispatches to providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, AWS Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, DeepSeek, and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
